channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-04-05 22:22 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Another Grok Imagine upgrade. Update now. Everything’s tighter. Subtle movement lands. It just flows...
item.description: Another Grok Imagine upgrade. Update now. Everything’s tighter. Subtle movement lands. It just flows. Details lock in. xAI engineers showing off.@Grok

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagine has gotten real good. These are Hollywood level quality of video.
item.description: Grok Imagine has gotten real good. These are Hollywood level quality of video.

item.title: @elonmusk: The videos feel so incredibly real and are filled with amazing details and genuine emotion
item.description: The videos feel so incredibly real and are filled with amazing details and genuine emotion

item.title: @elonmusk: SpaceX now has over 10,000 Starlink satellites in orbit (and growing), providing internet data servi...
item.description: SpaceX now has over 10,000 Starlink satellites in orbit (and growing), providing internet data service to every corner of the earth. Even ships at sea or aircraft in the sky can receive high speed internet service. Over 2/3 of the active satellites in orbit are Starlink now. And it won't create any long term trash in orbit. The orbits are so low (480 km to 550 km) that even if SpaceX were to lose control of one, the small satellites will run out of fuel within 5 years. Then they get dragged back into the atmosphere and burn up. Every satellite is in a lane to avoid other Starlink satellites. They all are connected to a collusion avoidance system and can make small course adjustments if needed. Starlink can provide high speed internet anywhere on the planet without having to bury expensive fiber cables underground or undersea. All you need is a small dish which scans the sky for the closest satellite to provide internet connectivity.

item.title: @elonmusk: I was sitting at the Cybercab production line, working late at night. One associate saw me and came ...
item.description: I was sitting at the Cybercab production line, working late at night. One associate saw me and came over to ask how I was doing. Then his eyes glittered. “One day I am going to apply for a job on the moon so that my grandchildren will be proud.” What a spirit.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok 4.20 Multi-Agent just ranked #1 on Search Arena (Style Control) Grok 4.20 set a new industry re...
item.description: Grok 4.20 Multi-Agent just ranked #1 on Search Arena (Style Control) Grok 4.20 set a new industry record on AA-Omniscience with 78% accuracy - the lowest hallucination rate ever recorded on the benchmark Beats Claude Opus 4.6 & Gemini 3.1 Pro

item.title: @elonmusk: Tesla’s Supercharger network just hit a massive new scale - 80,000+ active stalls worldwide It took ...
item.description: Tesla’s Supercharger network just hit a massive new scale - 80,000+ active stalls worldwide It took over a decade to build the first 40,000 Now Tesla just doubled it in less than four years The scale is wild. In Q1 2026 alone: • 1.8 TWh of energy delivered • 53 million individual charging sessions completed • Network wait times dropped to just <1% Tesla is also rapidly rolling out the new V4 Superchargers, capable of true 500 kW speeds The best part is these are not just for Teslas - Ford, GM, Rivian, Mercedes, Hyundai, Kia, and nearly every major EV brand now let their drivers use the Tesla superchargers because of the extreme reliability and massive network Tesla offers Tesla quietly built the entire EV charging ecosystem, and now legacy automakers struggle to sell cars without it - they are heavily relying on Tesla’s massive network to make their vehicles truly viable on the road and give customers the confidence to buy their cars

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagine just got a huge upgrade! Now you can create realistic cinematic shots. I’ve created a p...
item.description: Grok Imagine just got a huge upgrade! Now you can create realistic cinematic shots. I’ve created a prompt template to help you get similar results. Here’s how to use + examples ↓

item.title: @elonmusk: The Tesla Diner is obviously not something that matters financially to Tesla, but it is one of those...
item.description: The Tesla Diner is obviously not something that matters financially to Tesla, but it is one of those small delights that bring joy to life
